name: Dark Sky Site
description: True darkness. Milky Way casts shadows. ZHR > 50 for major showers.

name: Typical Dark Site
description: Unspoiled darkness. Milky Way dominates the sky. ZHR > 40.

name: Rural Sky
description: Light pollution is invisible. Milky Way has fine texture. ZHR > 30.

name: Rural/Suburban Transition
description: Faint glow on horizon. Milky Way still visible but dimmed. ZHR > 20.

name: Suburban Sky
description: Sky glow dominates most of the sky. Milky Way barely visible. ZHR > 10.

name: Bright Suburban Sky
description: Suburban skyglow brightens the whole sky. Milky Way not visible. ZHR > 5.

name: City Fringe
description: Sky is washed out near the zenith. Only brightest stars visible. ZHR > 2.

name: City Sky
description: Bright sky with almost no visible stars. Only the Moon and planets visible.

name: Center of City
description: Bright glare from streetlights. No stars visible except near zenith. ZHR < 2.
